title: hieracium pallescens subsp. tephrochlorum
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. tephrochlorum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium pallescens subsp. tephrochlorum lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
